intro: Between April 12 and 25, 2026, ZCyberNews tracked 15 articles on critical-infrastructure, featuring threat actors CyberAv3ngers, Lotus Wiper, and Sandworm. The most prominent vulnerability was CVE-2026-24032 (CVSS 7.3), with affected sectors including energy, manufacturing, utilities, and critical infrastructure. Regions impacted spanned the United States, Asia-Pacific, Europe, and North America. The coverage severity mix comprised 7 high, 3 critical, 3 informational, and 1 medium reports.
